_comment: ExplorerLens Test Corpus Manifest — Sprint 26 (v15.5.0 Zenith-V)
_description: Registry of all test files in data/corpus/. All files are CC0/synthetic unless noted. Path is relative to data/corpus/.

corpus.note: Populate this directory with CC0 or synthetically-generated test files. See data/corpus/README.md for provenance requirements.

synthetic_generators.description: Generates synthetic JPEG, PNG, WebP, and archive files for integration testing

provenance_requirements.verification: Each file entry MUST include license, source_url, and sha256
